response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong staff-level engineering leadership and mentorship, with a relevant CS degree and extensive experience in cloud and integration. His current role (assuming a typo in the start date) at Stripe involves highly relevant GenAI work with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol. However, he does not meet the minimum 8 years of experience specifically building AI-driven solutions and lacks explicit knowledge of vector databases and RAG architectures, which are critical for this GenAI role.
strengths: Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP).
Proven staff-level seniority with strong technical leadership and mentorship skills.
Extensive general software engineering background, including cloud platforms and system integration.
concerns: Does not meet the minimum 8 years of experience in building AI-driven solutions.
Lack of explicit experience with vector databases and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG).
The future start date for the most relevant GenAI experience at Stripe requires clarification.
